free_text: Neutron Activation Cross Sections for Br79, Br81,
Energy resolution varies from approximately 25 keV for
measurements below 100 keV to approximately 80 keV for
fission of White. Normalized at thermal.
Renormalized data received from Cox, May 1966.
Converted to new date formats, lower case.
DR Reference corrected to follow APS format
isotope at SUBENT 006 was changed on 73-TA-182-M2
OS. Correction in Sub.10, BIB updates
